payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Front-facing, partially edge-cropped dark brown leather recliner/couch with glossy, worn leather surface, prominent horizontal stitched seams and deep cushion wrinkles; plush padded armrests and a compressed seat cushion suggest a single-seat recliner appearance, right edge slightly cut off and top marginally cropped — estimated ~1.2 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather recliner, front","long_description":"Front-facing, partially edge-cropped dark brown leather recliner/couch with glossy, worn leather surface, prominent horizontal stitched seams and deep cushion wrinkles; plush padded armrests and a compressed seat cushion suggest a single-seat recliner appearance, right edge slightly cut off and top marginally cropped — estimated ~1.2 m from camera.","attributes":["dark brown","leather","glossy sheen","deep wrinkles/creases","horizontal stitched seams","plush padded armrests","compressed seat cushion","partial/right edge cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
